content.rendered:
On this page, you can find an overview of articles that contain vocabulary that’s mainly aimed at intermediate level students. Note that I tend to collect a lot of random vocabulary. Not all of it is especially important for you personally to know. I am simply listing words; it is your responsibility to choose which words you will need in your studies. There is also no reason to learn these topics in the order presented. Especially early on, it is good to cherry pick the vocabulary that is relevant to you personal rather than learning everything available by heart.

Intermediate level vocabulary

FINNISH VOCABULARY FOR INTERMEDIATE LEARNERS

1. Vocabulary Related to Hobbies

    • List of hobbies
    • Sports
    • Soccer – football
    • Hunting
    • Fishing
    • Vacationing
    • Gardening
    • Climbing
    • Sauna
    • Yoga
    • Horse riding
    • Geocaching
    • Chess

2. Vocabulary Related to People

    • Character and personality
    • Professions
    • Friendship and love
    • Weddings
    • Death
    • Negative emotions
    • Positive emotions

3. Home and Housing

    • Apartment building
    • Finding an apartment
    • Moving house
    • Tools
    • Cleaning

4. Daily Life Business

    • At the library
    • At the dentist’s
    • At the pharmacy
    • At the hair salon
    • At the store
    • In the hotel
    • At the police station
    • In the clothing store
    • At the movie theatre
    • At the bank
    • Postal services

5. Traffic

    • City traffic
    • Means of transport (-lla)
    • Travel and transportation
    • Traveling by bus
    • The compass
    • Boats, ships and cruises
    • Car parts

6. Cooking

    • “I cook” in Finnish
    • Cooking verbs
    • Dishes and kitchen appliances
    • Cooking recipe phrases

7. How Can I…

    • Describe what people look like
    • Communicate while visiting people
    • Ask for directions
    • Be polite in Finnish
    • Say “I can” in Finnish
    • Talk about my age and aging
    • Discuss pregnancy and delivery
    • Talk about babies
    • Talk about childhood
    • Express my opinion
    • Write an opinion piece
    • Express my feelings
    • Describe pain I feel
    • Support a friend
    • Describing household problems
    • Talk with co-workers
    • Talk about work experience
    • Talk about my education
    • Make suggestions in nursing homes
    • Talk on the phone

8. Conversation Questions

    • Questions about sleep
    • Questions about money
    • Questions about danger
    • Questions about city traffic
    • Questions about friendship
    • Questions about hobbies
    • Questions about colors
    • Questions about daily routines
    • Questions about the weather
    • Questions about children/parenting
    • Questions about appearance
    • Have you ever… questions
    • Questions utilizing the passive

9. Expressions of time

    • Telling the date
    • Talking about years
    • Questions of time
    • Choosing the right case
    • Example sentences
    • Time spans

10. More random vocabulary

    • Computer
    • Telephone
    • Religion
    • COVID-19
    • The beach
    • 100 random nouns 1
    • 100 random nouns 2

Please also check out my vocabulary lists for advanced learners! While I’ve put those in the “advanced” category, everything depends on your interests. A topic that might seemingly be difficult might be important to you as a learner when it lines up with your interests. I’m just one person, and this is my own view of the difficulty level of these vocabulary topics.
